title: God's Love Through Jesus Christ
verse: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son...

title: We Talk of Christ
verse: We talk of Christ, we rejoice in Christ, we preach of Christ...

title: The Infinite Atonement
verse: And he shall go forth, suffering pains and afflictions and temptations of every kind...

title: God's Work and Glory
verse: For behold, this is my work and my glory—to bring to pass the immortality and eternal life of man.

title: Faith Precedes Miracles
verse: Ye receive no witness until after the trial of your faith.

title: Repent and Be Converted
verse: Repent ye therefore, and be converted...

title: Follow the Example of Christ
verse: Follow thou me, and do the things which ye have seen me do...

title: The Oath and Covenant of the Priesthood
verse: For whoso is faithful unto the obtaining these two priesthoods...

title: Temple Ordinances
verse: For therein are the keys of the holy priesthood ordained...

title: Establish a House of God
verse: Organize yourselves; prepare every needful thing; and establish a house of God.

title: Who Shall Ascend Into the Hill of the Lord?
verse: He that hath clean hands, and a pure heart...

title: The Mountain of the Lord's House
verse: Come ye, and let us go up to the mountain of the Lord...

title: Turning the Hearts
verse: He shall turn the heart of the fathers to the children...

title: The Restoration of Sealing Keys
verse: Behold, the time has fully come...

title: A Welding Link
verse: For we without them cannot be made perfect...

title: Families Forever
verse: Then shall they be gods, because they have no end...

title: Behold, I Am Jesus Christ
verse: I am Jesus Christ, whom the prophets testified shall come into the world.
